headline: A Look At C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: What recent performance suggests about C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) has drawn attention after recent share price swings, with a 1 day gain of 1.5% contrasting with a month decline of 10% and a past 3 months return of 4.8%. Over longer horizons, total returns of 67.0% over the past year and very large gains over 3 and 5 years, alongside annual revenue of US$16.23b and net income of US$587.08m, give investors more context for today’s moves. See our latest...

headline: Ryanair's Traffic Numbers for March 2026 Improve Year Over Year
summary: RYAAY's passengers rise 5% year over year to 15.8M in March 2026, with load factor flat year over year at 93%.
